text: hi this is key from BBC learning english
today I'm going to tell you three
different ways of using the phrasal verb
we use pickup to describe learning
something so for example I can say
children pick up languages very quickly
and so can you at BBC learning English
second we use pickup informally to
describe buying something for example I
often pick up some milk on my way home
third we use pickup to describe getting
an illness so we can pick up languages
pick up some milk and pick up a cold
